recentTweets.text:
Reforms I fought for in the House are helping the VA deliver results for veterans.

MORE claims processed last year than any year on record.

LOWEST backlog since 2020.

I will never stop fighting for our veterans until every single one gets the benefits they earned in service.

🚨 LAUNCHING TODAY 🚨

The American Dream starts at birth.

Every eligible baby born between January 1, 2025 and January 1, 2029 gets a $1,000 Trump Account—fully funded by the Working Families Tax Cut.

We’re creating a generation of savers, investors, and owners—not dependence.
Coming to a Theater near you! “The Supply Siders” https://t.co/DFqxK2wbuG

Congratulations to Lee Lipton, the new U.S. Ambassador to the Philippines!

Celebrated Ambassador Lipton alongside @KariLake Lake, Senior Advisor for the U.S. Agency for Global Media, and Jose Manuel “Babe” G. Romualdez, the Philippines’ Ambassador to the United States.

The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act makes the most significant reforms to community banking in a decade. 

More access, more opportunity, more American Dreams being

Great to see KY Reps @RepBratcher and Wade Williams in DC today. Both are veterans and great champions of the military, and both are doing an outstanding job representing Hardin and Hopkins Counties, respectively, in Frankfort. https://t.co/JgIoHkwPIz

Sent off an outstanding group of 12 students from Kentucky’s Sixth District to the U.S. Service Academies. 

These young patriots will join the ranks of the world’s greatest military as officers—and lead our military into the future. We couldn’t be more proud of their dedication, https://t.co/NQWiGQfKAk

They showed the country what https://t.co/WoBQZNQebv

Congratulations to PM Modi for officially become the longest-serving Prime Minister in India’s history. As Vice-Chair of the Congressional India Caucus, I look forward to working with him to strengthen the special relationship between the U.S. and India.

Great ceremony on Sunday to commemorate the Blessing of the Bikes. Praying for a season of beautiful, safe riding throughout the Commonwealth for all our bikers. Grateful to Pastor Lowell Rice for dedicating this year’s event in honor of Tatum Dale, who loved attending each year. https://t.co/uuhxjtjIEn

Eighty-two years ago, heroic Americans stormed the beaches of Normandy. They saved America, they saved Europe, and they changed the world. 

We should forever be inspired by their patriotism and bravery. God bless our WWII veterans and our American military! https://t.co/2nZSb99KSi

Nearly $1 BILLION is being invested in Clean, Beautiful Coal nationwide—including $150 MILLION right here in the Commonwealth. Congratulations to @EastKYPowerCoop, @KentuckyPower, and @DukeEnergy Kentucky, both recipients. 

Thank you, President Trump, for delivering for our coal

Apply today!

Employment is UP! Wages are UP!

Nearly one year into the Working Families Tax Cut, the results are clear:

More jobs. Bigger paychecks. Stronger growth 🇺🇸

https://t.co/nMxvlXzAQf

Let’s be clear—Joe Biden’s weakness brought us the deadliest and costliest war in Europe since WWII. President Trump is cleaning up the mess.

Honored to join the President for this big announcement!

Alexander Hamilton said it best in Federalist 74, the direction of war demands “the exercise of power by a single hand.” 

That’s why this War Powers Resolution is so dangerous. It requires the Commander-in-Chief to get a permission slip from Congress to authorize military force

iPhone glass in Harrodsburg, Toyota expansion in Georgetown, and now microchips in Lexington. The Made in America Tax Credit in the Big Beautiful Bill is bringing jobs and production back home.

The future of manufacturing is in America, and #KY06 is leading the way.

Happy 234th Birthday, Kentucky!

For 234 years, the Commonwealth has been defined by hardworking families, strong communities, and an enduring spirit of freedom and opportunity.

Nothing better than letting hard-working Kentuckians keep what they earned.

Honored to be at the White House today for Kevin Warsh’s swearing-in as the new Chairman of the Federal Reserve. Chairman Warsh is the perfect choice for this job. He will focus the Fed on price stability and full domestic employment. I was able to shake Chairman Warsh’s hand and https://t.co/kQsUC5L3dt

President Trump made another outstanding selection by picking Kevin Warsh to lead the Federal Reserve. I look forward to working with Chairman Warsh in the years to come to fix the runaway inflation under Joe Biden, keep our capital markets strong, and refocus the Federal Reserve

Good morning from @FortCampbell — home of the legendary 101st Airborne “Screaming Eagles” and the elite 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment. I met today with Brigadier General Travis McIntosh to hear directly about how I can support the nearly 30,000 active-duty soldiers https://t.co/njH5fwlSuy

I'm honored to receive a 4-star rating from the Kentucky Guard Association for my legislative work to support the National Guard. 

It’s time to pass my No Tax on Drill Pay bill to exempt Guard drill pay from federal taxes. Whether you are active duty, reserve, or guard—I’ll https://t.co/UyNGZ6I9vh
Happy National Nurses Day to all our heroic nurses that lead with care and compassion every day. https://t.co/PJtjWbfm3I

Need help with your passport? The Congressional Passport Fair is back in Lexington, offering a convenient, one-stop shop close to home.

Be sure to bring all required documents and reserve your appointment here: https://t.co/48IMGcPmCa https://t.co/T1sB6QvAgt

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 2 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Andy Barr. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 2 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 2 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-06-04T21:12:49Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
